Here is the list of astrological signs and their corresponding scores on a scale of 1-10, along with a brief description for each:
1. Aries - 7 - Fearless and impulsive, Aries often jumps into new situations without thinking twice.
2. Taurus - 6 - Reliable and practical, Taurus tends to be cautious and slow to change their minds.
3. Gemini - 8 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Gemini excels at communication and social interactions.
4. Cancer - 9 - Emotionally intelligent and empathetic, Cancer is highly attuned to the feelings of others.
5. Leo - 7 - Confident and charismatic, Leo loves being the center of attention and can be quite dramatic.
6. Virgo - 8 - Analytical and detail-oriented, Virgo is a perfectionist who thrives on organization and structure.
7. Libra - 9 - Diplomatic and balanced, Libra strives for harmony and fairness in all aspects of life.
8. Scorpio - 8 - Passionate and intense, Scorpio is fiercely loyal and protective of those they care about.
9. Sagittarius - 6 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarius loves exploring new horizons and expanding their knowledge.
10. Capricorn - 7 - Disciplined and ambitious, Capricorn is driven to succeed and build a strong foundation for themselves.
11. Aquarius - 8 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarius values individuality and freedom above all else.
12. Pisces - 9 - Imaginative and compassionate, Pisces has a deep connection to their intuition and the spiritual realm.

Note: These scores are based on general traits associated with each sign, but keep in mind that individuals can vary greatly depending on many factors, including their rising sign, moon sign, and personal characteristics.
